pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh which explicitly outputs to this file path, and verifier.py which correctly loads it.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task operates on a synthetically generated specification text file (/home/ga/Desktop/upgrade_spec.txt) to construct a new OpenVSP model at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/heavy_launch_vehicle.vsp3. The target dimensions for Core (25.0m) and SRB (15.0m, X-offset 10.0m, Y-offset 2.2m) match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt and verifier.py logic. Discovered a critical defect in the verifier's XML parsing: it incorrectly searches for <Sym_Rot_Flag> and <Sym_Rot_Num> parameters, instead of the actual OpenVSP v3 schema tags <Sym_Axial_Flag> and <Sym_Rot_N>. Consequently, an agent perfectly completing the task will score exactly 70 points (the bare minimum required to pass) while permanently losing 30 points to the broken symmetry check.
